compiled.prompt: Moody album cover portrait for a nocturnal R&B single. Color palette: #123456, #abcdef, #f97316. Element 1 — neon portrait cutout: include as color influence, lighting reference, mood reference. Element 2 — rain texture: include as texture or surface quality, composition reference. Mood and intent: intimate, cinematic, wet asphalt glow. Set any typography in the style of Small serif title lockup; do not render text unless the brief asks for it. Generate a single cohesive image that combines the above.
